debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
A : Finset ι
m : ℕ
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
inst✝² : IsFiniteMeasure μ
mE : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
X : ι → Ω → E
iIndepFun_X : iIndepFun X μ
identDistrib_neg_X : ∀ (i : ι), IdentDistrib (X i) (-X i) μ μ
memLp_X : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X i) (2 * ↑m) μ
this : DecidableEq ι
integrable_prod_norm_X : ∀ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A, Integrable (fun ω => ∏ k, ‖X (I k).1 ω‖ * ‖X (I k).2 ω‖) μ
integrable_prod_inner_X :
  ∀ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A, Integrable (fun ω => ∏ k, inner ℝ (X (I k).1 ω) (X (I k).2 ω)) μ
EvenIndex : (Fin m → ι × ι) → Prop := fun I => ∀ i ∈ A, Even ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card)
⊢ ∑ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A with EvenIndex I,
      ∫ (ω : Ω), ∏ i ∈ A, ‖X i ω‖ ^ ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card) ∂μ =
    ∑ w ∈ A.piAntidiag (2 * m) with ∀ i ∈ A, 2 ∣ w i, ↑(multinomial A w) * ∫ (ω : Ω), ∏ i ∈ A, ‖X i ω‖ ^ w i ∂μ

      · ext; exact h1 _

let f I i := (univ.filter (λ k, (I k).1 = i)).card + (univ.filter (λ k, (I k).2 = i)).card
      rw [sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (λ I hI ↦ mem_piAntidiag.2 ⟨λ i hi ↦ by
        simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_product] at hI
        rw [add_eq_zero, card_eq_zero, card_eq_zero, filter_eq_empty_iff, filter_eq_empty_iff]
        exact ⟨λ k hk ↦ hi (hI k).1 hk, λ k hk ↦ hi (hI k).2 hk⟩,
        by simp_rw [f, sum_add_distrib, ← card_fiberwise_of_maps_to (λ k _, (hI k).1),
          ← card_fiberwise_of_maps_to (λ k _, (hI k).2), card_univ, card_fin]⟩)]
      simp_rw [EvenIndex, sum_filter]
      refine sum_congr rfl (λ w hw ↦ ?_)
      split_ifs with h <;> simp [h]
      rw [sum_congr rfl (λ I hI ↦ by simp [(mem_filter.1 hI).2]), sum_const]
      let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
        (Equiv.curry _ _ _).symm.trans (Equiv.piCongrLeft (equivProdFin m 2).symm)
      have : (filter (λ I ↦ f I = w) (A ×ˢ A ^^ m)).card =
        (filter (λ J : Fin (2 * m) → ι ↦ (λ i ↦ (univ.filter (λ k, J k = i)).card) = w ∧ ∀ k, J k ∈ A) univ).card := by
        rw [← card_congr e]
        congr; ext J; simp [f, e, Equiv.curry, Equiv.piCongrLeft, equivProdFin, -equivProdFin_apply]
      rw [this, ← piFinset_singleton_apply (λ _ : Fin (2 * m), A), filter_filter,
        card_piFinset_filter_count_eq_multinomial A w (mem_piAntidiag.1 hw).2 (mem_piAntidiag.1 hw).1]

rw [sum_fiberwise (piAntidiag A (2 * m)) (fun I i ↦ #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i})]
      · simp_rw [EvenIndex, filter_filter]
        refine sum_congr rfl (fun w hw ↦ ?_)
        rw [mem_filter, mem_piAntidiag] at hw
        simp_rw [hw.1, mul_comm, ← nsmul_eq_mul, ← sum_const]
        refine (Equiv.reindex (Fin 2 ⊕ Fin 2 → Fin 2) (equivFin (2 * m))).piFinset.card_filter_fiber_eq_multinomial A w
      · intro I hI
        simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_product, forall_and] at hI
        simp [piAntidiag, hI.1.1, hI.1.2, ← sum_add_distrib, sum_card_fiber_eq_card]

let e : (Fin (2 * m) → ι) ≃ (Fin m → ι × ι) := (Equiv.piCurry ..).trans (Equiv.piCongrLeft' fun _ ↦ equivFinProd m 2)
      rw [← e.sum_comp, ← sum_filter, Nat.sum_multinomial, ← sum_filter]
      simp [e, count, EvenIndex, mem_piFinset, mem_product, forall_and, ← forall_and]
      congr! 2 with w; by_cases h : ∀ i ∈ A, 2 ∣ w i <;> simp [h]

rw [sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun I _ ↦ (piAntidiag_mem_total A (2 * m)).2 (by
        simp_rw [sum_add_distrib, ← card_fiberwise_univ, sum_card_fiber_eq_card, card_fin,
          ← two_mul]))]
      simp_rw [mem_filter, EvenIndex, fun w hw ↦ (mem_piAntidiag.1 (filter_subset _ _ hw)).2,
        sum_const, Nat.cast_mul, true_and]
      refine sum_congr rfl (fun w hw ↦ ?_)
      congr
      rw [← card_fiber_multinomial A w (mem_piAntidiag.1 (filter_subset _ _ hw)).1]
      let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
        (Equiv.arrowCongr (Equiv.refl (Fin m)) (Equiv.piFinTwo ι).symm).trans
        ((Equiv.curry _ _ _).symm.trans (Equiv.arrowCongr (finProdFinEquiv m 2) (Equiv.refl ι)))
      exact (card_congr (fun I _ ↦ e I) (by sorry) (by sorry) (by sorry)).symm

rw [sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun I _ ↦ mem_piAntidiag.2 ⟨fun _ _ ↦ zero_le _,
        by simp [← card_univ, ← sum_add_distrib, ← card_fiberwise_univ, card_fin]⟩)]
      refine sum_congr rfl fun w hw ↦ ?_
      simp_rw [mem_filter, EvenIndex, ← and_assoc, and_comm (a := (∀ i ∈ A, 2 ∣ w i)), and_assoc]
      split_ifs with h <;> simp [h, sum_const, mul_comm,
        multinomial_eq_card_piFinset_filter A w (2 * m) (mem_piAntidiag.1 hw.1).2]
      let e := (Equiv.finProdFinEquiv m 2).symm.trans (Equiv.curry _ _ _).symm
      refine card_congr (fun I _ ↦ e I) (by simp [e, mem_piFinset, mem_product, (mem_piAntidiag.1 hw.1).1])
        (by simp [e]) (fun J hJ ↦ ⟨e.symm J, by simp [e, hJ, mem_piFinset, mem_product, (mem_piAntidiag.1 hw.1).1], by simp⟩)
      · simp [e, sum_add_distrib, ← card_fiberwise_univ]

let e := (Equiv.arrowProdEquiv (Fin m) ι ι).trans (Equiv.sumArrowEquiv.symm.trans
        (Equiv.arrowCongr (finSumFinEquiv m m).symm (Equiv.refl ι)))
      have h I i : ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card) = {k | e I k = i}.card := by
        simp [e, ← card_sum, filter_sum]
      rw [sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun I hI ↦ by
        simpa [mem_piAntidiag, h, sum_card_fiberwise] using (mem_filter.1 hI).1)]
      refine sum_congr rfl fun w hw ↦ ?_
      simp_rw [mem_filter, mem_piAntidiag] at hw ⊢
      rw [multinomial_spec A w hw.1.2, ← card_congr e, ← integral_mul_left, mul_comm]
      congr 2; ext I
      simp [h, e, mem_piFinset, forall_and, EvenIndex, hw.2, even_iff_two_dvd]

let f I i := (univ.filter (fun k ↦ (I k).1 = i)).card + (univ.filter (fun k ↦ (I k).2 = i)).card
      rw [sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun I hI ↦ mem_piAntidiag.2 ⟨fun i hi ↦ by
        simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_product] at hI; exact fun h ↦ by simpa [h] using hI i,
        by simp [f, ← sum_add_distrib, card_univ]⟩)]
      simp_rw [EvenIndex, filter_mem_set_of_iff]
      refine sum_congr rfl (fun w hw ↦ ?_)
      rw [mem_filter] at hw
      simp_rw [hw.2, sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_comm]
      congr
      let e := (Equiv.piCongrRight fun _ ↦ (Equiv.piFinTwo ℝ ι).symm).trans
        ((Equiv.piCurry ι (Fin m) (Fin 2)).symm.trans (Equiv.piCongrLeft (equivFinProdFinEquiv m 2)))
      rw [← card_map e, card_piFinset_counts_eq_multinomial A (2 * m) w hw.1]
      congr; ext J; simp [e, f, counts, Equiv.piCongrRight, Equiv.piFinTwo, Equiv.piCurry, Equiv.piCongrLeft]

let f (I : Fin m → ι × ι) i := #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i}
      have hf : ∀ I ∈ A ×ˢ A ^^ m, f I ∈ A.piAntidiag (2 * m) := fun I hI ↦ mem_piAntidiag.2
        ⟨by simp [f, ← sum_add_distrib, sum_card_fiberwise], fun i hi ↦ by simp [f, hi]⟩
      rw [sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to hf]
      refine sum_congr rfl (fun w hw ↦ ?_)
      simp only [EvenIndex, mem_filter, mem_piAntidiag] at hw ⊢
      simp only [hw.2, if_true, sum_const, card_fiber]
      congr 1
      rw [← multinomial_eq_card_count A w hw.1.2]
      let e := (Equiv.uncurry (Fin m) (Fin 2) ι).trans (Equiv.reindex finProdFinEquiv.symm (fun _ ↦ ι))
      refine card_congr (fun I _ ↦ e I) ?_ (fun _ _ _ _ h ↦ e.injective h) (fun g hg ↦ ⟨e.symm g, ?_⟩)
      · simp [e, f, count, sum_add_distrib, card_add_split, finProdFinEquiv]
      · simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_product] at hg; simpa [e] using hg.1

let g w := ∫ ω, ∏ i ∈ A, ‖X i ω‖ ^ w i ∂μ
      rw [sum_filter, ← sum_multinomial_target A (2 * m) (fun w ↦ if ∀ i ∈ A, 2 ∣ w i then g w else 0)]
      simp_rw [ite_mul, zero_mul, sum_ite, sum_const_zero, add_zero]
      let e : (Fin (2 * m) → ι) ≃ (Fin m → ι × ι) :=
        ((finProdFinEquiv (fun _ ↦ 2) m).symm.arrowCongr (Equiv.refl ι)).trans
          ((Equiv.curry _ _ _).symm.trans ((Equiv.refl _).arrowCongr (Equiv.piFinTwoEquiv fun _ ↦ ι).symm))
      refine sum_bij (fun J _ ↦ e J) (fun J hJ ↦ by simpa [e, piFinset, mem_product] using hJ)
        (fun J hJ ↦ by simp [e, EvenIndex, -sum_filter]) (fun _ _ _ _ ↦ e.injective)
        (fun I hI ↦ ⟨e.symm I, by simpa [e, piFinset, mem_product] using hI, by simp⟩)
        (fun J hJ ↦ by simp [e, g, -sum_filter])

let f I i := {k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card
      have hf : ∀ I ∈ (A ×ˢ A) ^^ m, f I ∈ piAntidiag A (2 * m) := fun I hI ↦ mem_piAntidiag.mpr
        ⟨by simp [f, ← sum_add_distrib, sum_card_filter_univ_eq_card],
         fun i hi ↦ by simp [f, card_eq_zero, filter_eq_empty_iff, (mem_piFinset.1 hI _).1,
          (mem_piFinset.1 hI _).2, hi]⟩
      rw [sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to hf]
      refine sum_congr rfl (fun w hw ↦ ?_)
      simp only [mem_filter, EvenIndex] at hw ⊢
      simp [hw.2, mul_comm, ← card_filter_univ_count_eq_multinomial _ _ _ hw.1.1 hw.1.2]
      let e := ((finProdFinEquiv m 2).arrowCongr (Equiv.refl ι)).symm.trans (Equiv.curry _ _ _).symm
      rw [← e.card_preimage]; congr; ext I i
      simp [f, e, Fin.sum_univ_two, finProdFinEquiv, Equiv.curry, card_filter_product]

let f I i := #{k | (I k).1 = i}.card + #{k | (I k).2 = i}.card
      have hf I (hI : I ∈ A ×ˢ A ^^ m) : f I ∈ A.piAntidiag (2 * m) := by
        simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_product, forall_and, mem_piAntidiag, f] at hI ⊢
        rw [sum_add_distrib, ← card_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun k ↦ (I k).1) A hI.1,
          ← card_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun k ↦ (I k).2) A hI.2]; simp
      rw [sum_filter_fiberwise (A.piAntidiag (2 * m)) f hf]
      refine sum_congr rfl (fun w hw ↦ ?_)
      simp only [mem_filter, mem_piAntidiag] at hw ⊢
      split_ifs with h <;> [skip; simp [h]]
      simp only [h, true_and, ← multinomial_univ_eq_card_fiber, ← hw.1]
      let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
        (Equiv.arrowCongr (Equiv.refl _) Equiv.piFinTwoEquiv).trans Equiv.curry.symm |>.trans
        (Equiv.arrowCongr finProdFinEquiv.symm (Equiv.refl _))
      refine card_bij (fun I _ ↦ e I) ?_ (fun _ _ _ _ ↦ e.injective) ?_
      · intro I hI; simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset, mem_product] at hI ⊢
        simp only [counts, e, f, hI.2, ← hI.1, Equiv.trans_apply, Equiv.arrowCongr_apply,
          Equiv.refl_apply, Equiv.piFinTwoEquiv_apply, Equiv.curry_symm_apply]
        sorry
      · intro J hJ; simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset] at hJ ⊢
        use e.symm J; simp [hJ, f, e, counts]
        sorry

let f : (Fin m → ι × ι) → (ι → ℕ) := fun I i ↦ {k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card
      have hf : ∀ I ∈ piFinset (fun _ ↦ A ×ˢ A), f I ∈ A.piAntidiag (2 * m) := fun I hI ↦ mem_piAntidiag.2
        ⟨fun i _ ↦ Nat.zero_le _, by simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_product] at hI; simp [f, sum_add_distrib, ← card_fiberwise_univ, card_univ, card_fin, hI]⟩
      rw [sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to hf]
      refine sum_congr rfl (fun w hw ↦ ?_)
      simp only [EvenIndex, mem_filter, mem_piAntidiag] at hw ⊢
      split_ifs with h
      · rw [← sum_mul, ← Nat.cast_sum, mul_comm, multinomial_eq_card_piFinset_filter_count A w (2 * m) hw.2]
        let φ : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) := (Equiv.PiCongrLeft _ fun _ ↦ (Equiv.piFinTwo ι).symm).trans
          ((Equiv.curry _ _ _).symm.trans (Equiv.reindexFinSum _ _ _).symm)
        refine card_congr (fun I _ ↦ φ I) (fun I hI ↦ ?_) (fun _ _ _ _ ↦ φ.injective) (fun J hJ ↦ ⟨φ.symm J, ?_⟩)
        · simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset, mem_product, f, count_fintype, ← Fintype.card_sum,
            Equiv.card_fiber_eq_card_fiber, true_and, φ] at hI ⊢
          intro i; simp [φ, Sum.forall, forall_and] at hI; simp [hI]
        · simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset, Equiv.apply_symm_apply, f, count_fintype, ← Fintype.card_sum,
            Equiv.card_fiber_eq_card_fiber, true_and, φ] at hJ ⊢
          intro i; simp [φ, Sum.forall, forall_and]; simp [hJ]
      · rw [sum_empty, zero_mul]

let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
        (Equiv.arrowCongr (finProdFinEquiv 2 m).symm (Equiv.refl ι)).symm.trans (Equiv.curry _ _ _).symm
      let g f i := (univ.filter (fun j ↦ f j = i)).card
      have hI I : I ∈ A ×ˢ A ^^ m ↔ ∀ j, e I j ∈ A := by
        simp [e, mem_piFinset, mem_product, forall_and, ← forall_mem_univ_prod]
        constructor <;> intro h
        · intro j; cases j.1 using Fin.cases <;> simp [*]
        · constructor <;> intro k <;> [exact (h (0, k)); exact (h (1, k))]
      have hE I : EvenIndex I ↔ ∀ i ∈ A, 2 ∣ g (e I) i := by
        simp [EvenIndex, g, e, ← card_univ_prod, ← univ_product_univ, filter_product_or, add_comm]
      rw [← e.sum_comp]; simp_rw [← hI, mem_filter, mem_piFinset, hE]
      rw [sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun f hf ↦ ?_)]
      · simp_rw [integral_const_mul, ← Nat.cast_mul, mul_comm]
        refine sum_congr rfl (fun w hw ↦ ?_)
        simp only [mem_filter, mem_piAntidiag] at hw
        rw [multinomial_eq_card_piFinset_filter A w (2 * m) hw.1.2]
        congr 1; simp [g, (fun i hi ↦ card_eq_zero.2 (filter_eq_empty_iff.2 fun j _ ↦ (hf j).ne hi.symm))]
      · simp [g, mem_piAntidiag, card_univ, (fun i hi ↦ card_eq_zero.2 (filter_eq_empty_iff.2 fun j _ ↦ (hf j).ne hi.symm))]

let e : (Fin m → ι × ι) ≃ (Fin (2 * m) → ι) :=
        (Equiv.piCongrLeft fun _ ↦ equivFinTwo m).trans (equivFinProd m 2).symm.piCongrLeft
      have hf I : (fun i ↦ #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i}) =
          fun i ↦ (univ.filter fun j ↦ e I j = i).card := by
        ext i; simp [e, ← card_product_univ, filter_product_card, Equiv.sum_comp, sum_add_distrib]
      rw [sum_bij (fun I _ ↦ e I) (fun I hI ↦ by simpa [e, hf, EvenIndex] using hI) (fun _ _ _ _ ↦ e.injective)
        (fun h hh ↦ ⟨e.symm h, by simpa [e, hf] using hh, by simp⟩),
        sum_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun h hh ↦ mem_piAntidiag.2 ⟨fun _ _ ↦ zero_le _, by simpa using (mem_filter.1 hh).1⟩)]
      · simp [nsmul_eq_mul, ← multinomial_eq_card_piFinset_count A, (mem_filter.1 ·).2]
      · simp [hf]
